zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugo de Malebisse於1072年10月12日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾阿卡斯特 馬爾比斯時，他的父親Hugh De Malebisse42歲，母親Mrs Hugh de MALBIE42歲。他於1100年之前與Baroness Emma d'Percy結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1140年在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾阿卡斯特 馬爾比斯享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾阿卡斯特 馬爾比斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of   Hugh  , used throughout the Middle Ages in official documents, and now enjoying a revival as a given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugo de Malebisse was born on 12 October 1072, in Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh De Malebisse, was 42 and his mother, Mrs Hugh de MALBIE, was 42. He married Baroness Emma d'Percy before 1100. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1140, in Acaster Malbis, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Acaster Malbis, North Yorkshire, England: Acaster Malbis, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugo de Malebisse est né le 12 octobre 1072, à Acaster Malbis, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh De Malebisse, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Mrs Hugh de MALBIE, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Baroness Emma d'Percy avant 1100. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1140, à Acaster Malbis, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Acaster Malbis, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugo de Malebisse am 12. Oktober 1072 in Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh De Malebisse 42 und seine Mutter Mrs Hugh de MALBIE 42. Er hat vor 1100 Baroness Emma d'Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1140 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Acaster Malbis, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugo de Malebisse è nato il il 12 ottobre 1072 nel Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hugh De Malebisse, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Hugh de MALBIE, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Baroness Emma d'Percy prima del 1100. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1140, nel Acaster Malbis, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugo de Malebisseが1072年10月12日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアアカスター マルビスで生まれた時，父Hugh De Malebisseは42歳，母Mrs Hugh de MALBIEは42歳であった。1100年以前にBaroness Emma d'Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1140年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアアカスター マルビスで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアアカスター マルビスにて埋葬された。

ko.Acaster Malbis, North Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 악아스터 맬비스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugo de Malebisse(이)가 1072년 10월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 악아스터 맬비스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh De Malebisse(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Hugh de MALBIE(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1100년 이전 Baroness Emma d'Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1140년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 악아스터 맬비스에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 악아스터 맬비스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugo de Malebisse nasceu em 12 de outubro de 1072, em Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh De Malebisse, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Hugh de MALBIE, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness Emma d'Percy antes 1100. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1140, em Acaster Malbis, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Acaster Malbis, North Yorkshire, England: акастир малбис, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugo de Malebisse родился 12 октября 1072 г. в местности акастир малбис, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh De Malebisse было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Hugh de MALBIE, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness Emma d'Percy перед 1100 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1140 г. в местности акастир малбис, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности акастир малбис, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
